name: Agile CRM
shortDescription: Manage Agile CRM contacts, companies, deals, tasks, notes, and tags directly from your flows. Authentication uses **HTTP Basic** with your account email and REST API key (`base64('{email}:{apiKey}')`); all requests target `https://{subdomain}.agilecrm.com/dev/api`.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new person contact in Agile CRM. Provide any of the simple fields (first name, last name, email, phone, company, title) which are converted into Agile's properties array, and/or pass a raw properties array for custom fields and non-default subtypes. Tags may be attached at creation.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieves a single contact by its Agile CRM id. The response includes the raw properties array plus a flattened 'simple' object for convenient field access.

actions.name: Get Contact by Email
actions.description: Looks up a contact by its email address. Returns the matching contact with the raw properties array and a flattened 'simple' object, or an error if no contact matches.

actions.name: List Contacts
actions.description: Retrieves a page of contacts from Agile CRM using cursor-based pagination. Returns an array of contacts (each with a flattened 'simple' object) and a cursor for the next page when more results are available.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates properties on an existing contact. Provide the contact id plus any simple fields to change and/or a raw properties array. Only the supplied properties are modified; omitted properties are left untouched.

actions.name: Delete Contact
actions.description: Permanently deletes a contact by id. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Search Contacts
actions.description: Full-text search across contacts or companies by keyword. Filter by record type and control page size. Returns matching records, each with a flattened 'simple' object.

actions.name: Add Tags to Contact
actions.description: Adds one or more tags to a contact identified by email address. Tags already present are left unchanged.

actions.name: Delete Tags from Contact
actions.description: Removes one or more tags from a contact identified by email address.

actions.name: Create Company
actions.description: Creates a company record in Agile CRM. Provide the company name and optional website/phone which are converted into Agile's properties array, and/or pass a raw properties array for custom fields.

actions.name: Get Company
actions.description: Retrieves a single company by its Agile CRM id, including the raw properties array and a flattened 'simple' object.

actions.name: List Companies
actions.description: Retrieves a page of companies using cursor-based pagination. Returns an array of companies (each with a flattened 'simple' object) and a cursor for the next page when available.

actions.name: Update Company
actions.description: Updates properties on an existing company. Provide the company id plus any simple fields to change and/or a raw properties array. Only supplied properties are modified.

actions.name: Delete Company
actions.description: Permanently deletes a company by id. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Deal
actions.description: Creates a deal (opportunity) in Agile CRM. Expected value is required. Associate the deal with a track (pipeline) and milestone using the Get Tracks and Get Milestones dictionaries, and optionally link it to contacts.

actions.name: Get Deal
actions.description: Retrieves a single deal (opportunity) by its Agile CRM id.

actions.name: List Deals
actions.description: Retrieves a page of deals (opportunities) using cursor-based pagination. Returns the deals array and a cursor for the next page when available.

actions.name: Update Deal
actions.description: Partially updates a deal. Provide the deal id plus any fields to change; omitted fields are left unchanged. Use the Get Tracks and Get Milestones dictionaries to select a track and milestone.

actions.name: Delete Deal
actions.description: Permanently deletes a deal (opportunity) by id. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a task in Agile CRM. Set a subject, task type, priority, and due date (Unix timestamp in seconds), and optionally associate it with contacts.

actions.name: List Pending Tasks
actions.description: Retrieves pending (incomplete) tasks due within the given number of days from today.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Updates an existing task. Provide the task id plus any fields to change; omitted fields are left unchanged.

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Permanently deletes a task by id. This action cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Note
actions.description: Creates a note and links it to one or more contacts. Provide a subject, description, and the contact ids to associate.

actions.name: List Notes for Contact
actions.description: Retrieves all notes attached to a specific contact, ordered by most recent first.

idealUseCases: Sync inbound leads into Agile CRM as contacts and companies, then tag and route them automatically.
Keep sales pipelines current by creating and updating deals, tracks, and milestones from your flows.
Automate follow-up by creating tasks and notes tied to specific contacts.
Enrich or clean CRM records in bulk by searching, updating, and re-tagging contacts.
agentIdeas: When **Typeform** "Get Form Responses" returns a new lead submission, call **Agile CRM**
After **Agile CRM** "Create Deal" runs, use **Gmail** "Send Message" to notify the sales owner
Use **Agile CRM** "List Contacts" to pull records, then **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to export each
